However, pink catheters also offer visibility benefits without additional features like flow sensors, making them equally suitable but perhaps simpler to use due to fewer components needing attention.

**My Analysis:** Agree; while both blue/green provide useful flow sensing technology, simplicity may favor pink catheters in some scenarios despite lacking those advanced features.
